comments.text: dont fall for this promotions and features exists only on paper.. as a customer my experience very bad in all aspects.. they hav worst customer care.. worst app with features only to promote products not to serve customer.. lots of delay in response.. high rejections for no reason.. three times cost for doctor consultations.. worst tracking for medicines order.. most of the time half of medicines wont be available and they take more than week to deliver.. you cant buy frm shop and reiumburse.. lot of issues with ilombard
comments.author: @rambabuinavilli2091
